heroSubtitle: Official Microsoft AI courses for healthcare organizations. Certification-aligned training developed in partnership with Microsoft — for users, admins, and builders.

courses.title: Certification
courses.subtitle: Training aligned to Microsoft's official AI certification pathways.

items.title: AI for End Users
items.description: Train your workforce to use Microsoft Copilot and AI-powered tools in their daily work. Covers Copilot in Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and Teams.

items.title: Microsoft 365 Administration
items.description: Equip your IT and admin teams to configure, manage, and secure AI features across your Microsoft 365 environment.

items.title: Copilot Builders
items.description: Build custom Copilot agents and AI solutions tailored to your organization's needs. For teams ready to extend beyond out-of-the-box AI tools.

formats.title: Training
formats.subtitle: Every course is available in the format that works best for your team.

items.title: Webinars
items.description: Live introductory sessions covering what's new in Microsoft AI and how it applies to healthcare workflows.

items.title: Virtual Workshops
items.description: Hands-on, certification-aligned training delivered remotely in small groups with guided exercises.

items.title: In-Person Workshops
items.description: On-site training in your environment using your organization's M365 setup and real-world scenarios.

items.title: Coaching
items.description: Post-training coaching to reinforce skills and drive adoption across your teams.

partnership.title: Developed with
partnership.description: Our Microsoft AI training programs are developed in partnership with Microsoft and aligned to their official certification pathways. Your team gets training that counts — built by people who know healthcare.
highlights: Hands-on labs using your M365 environment

ctaSubtitle: Let's find the right courses for your team.
